stem: A remotely operated underwater vehicle is used for ocean research. The function h(x) = −(1/40)(x + 12)(x − 50) gives the depth below the surface of the ocean, in meters, of the vehicle x minutes after it began collecting a sample, where x > 0. How many minutes after beginning to collect the sample does the vehicle return to the surface of the ocean?
rationale: The vehicle is at the surface when its depth is zero. Setting h(x) = 0 gives (x + 12)(x − 50) = 0, so x = −12 or x = 50. Because x > 0, the device returns to the surface 50 minutes after it began collecting the sample.
